title: Incommensurate Spin-Density Waves in a Frustrated Maple-Leaf Lattice Ferromagnet
abstract: We study how ferromagnetism breaks down in the spin-$\tfrac12$ nearest-neighbor Heisenberg model on the maple-leaf lattice with ferromagnetic $J_t,J_d$ and antiferromagnetic $J_h$, motivated by the mixed ferro-antiferromagnetic interactions in Na$_2$Mn$_3$O$_7$. Exact diagonalization shows that the ferromagnetic boundary does not feature a zero-field spin-nematic phase on the clusters studied here, but an extended regime of incommensurate spin-density-wave correlations with continuously evolving ordering vector. The phase diagram also contains collinear Néel, canted $120^\circ$, and hexagonal-singlet regimes, separated by regions that remain difficult to classify from exact diagonalization alone. Variational tests of fully symmetric Gutzwiller-projected Abrikosov-fermion U(1) and $\mathbb{Z}_2$ states find no competitive spin-liquid description of the interior unresolved regions. By contrast, on the ruby-lattice boundary we identify a point between the collinear Néel and hexagonal-singlet phases where a projected $\mathbb{Z}_2$ Ansatz reproduces the finite-size energy and spin correlations with good accuracy.
summary: 我们研究了铁磁性如何在枫叶晶格上的自旋 $\tfrac12$ 最近邻海森堡模型中分解，铁磁性 $J_t,J_d$ 和反铁磁性 $J_h$ 受到 Na$_2$Mn$_3$O$_7$ 中混合铁反铁磁性相互作用的推动。精确的对角化表明，铁磁边界在本文研究的团簇上并不具有零场自旋向列相，而是具有不断演化的有序向量的不相称的自旋密度波相关性的扩展范围。相图还包含共线 Néel、倾斜 $120^\circ$ 和六方单线态，这些区域由仍难以仅通过精确对角化进行分类的区域分隔开。完全对称 Gut​​zwiller 投影的 Abrikosov-fermion U(1) 和 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 状态的变分测试没有发现内部未解析区域的竞争性自旋液体描述。相比之下，在红宝石晶格边界上，我们确定了共线 Néel 相和六角单线相之间的一个点，其中投影 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ Ansatz 能够以良好的精度再现有限大小的能量和自旋相关性。

title: The critical slowing down in diffusion models
abstract: Computational sampling has been central to the sciences since the mid-20th century. While machine-learning-based approaches have recently enabled major advances, their behavior remains poorly understood, with limited theoretical control over when and why they succeed. Here we provide such insight for diffusion models-a class of generative schemes highly effective in practice-by analyzing their application to the $O(n)$ model of statistical field theory in the Gaussian limit $n \to \infty$. In this analytically tractable setting, we show that training a score model with a one-layer network architecture matching the exact solution exhibits a form of critical slowing down in parameter learning. This slowing down also impacts the generation process, indicating that the well-known difficulties of sampling near criticality persist even for learned generative models. To overcome this bottleneck, we demonstrate the power of combining architectural depth with physical locality. We find that using a two-layer architecture drastically reduces the critical slowing down, with the training time scaling logarithmically rather than quadratically with system size. By introducing a local score approximation we show that this acceleration in training time can be achieved without increasing the number of neural network parameters. Taken together, these results demonstrate that diffusion models can overcome the critical slowing down through appropriate architectural design, and establish a controlled framework for understanding and improving learned sampling methods in statistical physics and beyond.
summary:
自 20 世纪中叶以来，计算采样一直是科学的核心。虽然基于机器学习的方法最近取得了重大进展，但人们对它们的行为仍然知之甚少，对它们何时以及为何成功的理论控制有限。在这里，我们通过分析扩散模型在高斯极限 $n \to \infty$ 下统计场论 $O(n)$ 模型中的应用，为扩散模型（一类在实践中非常有效的生成方案）提供了这样的见解。在这种分析上易于处理的环境中，我们表明，训练具有与精确解决方案匹配的单层网络架构的评分模型会在参数学习中表现出一种严重减慢的形式。这种放缓也会影响生成过程，这表明即使对于学习的生成模型，在临界点附近采样的众所周知的困难仍然存在。为了克服这个瓶颈，我们展示了将架构深度与物理局部性相结合的力量。我们发现，使用两层架构可以极大地减少关键的减速，训练时间随系统规模呈对数而不是呈二次方缩放。

通过引入局部分数近似，我们表明可以在不增加神经网络参数数量的情况下实现训练时间的加速。总而言之，这些结果表明，扩散模型可以通过适当的架构设计克服关键的减速，并建立一个受控框架来理解和改进统计物理及其他领域的学习采样方法。

title: Lattice Gauging Interfaces and Noninvertible Defects in Higher Dimensions
abstract: We study gauging interfaces and their defect descendants in lattice models with generalized symmetries in higher dimensions. We construct explicit interface Hamiltonians for gauging a $\mathbb Z_2^{(0)}$ symmetry in $(2+1)d$ and a $\mathbb Z_2^{(1)}$ symmetry in $(3+1)d$. In higher dimensions, and especially in the presence of higher-form symmetries, the topological nature of gauging interfaces is obscured by the fact that the constrained Hilbert space depends on the location of the interface. We resolve this by introducing movement operators acting on a common unconstrained Hilbert space, which transport both the interface Hamiltonians and the associated constraints. As applications, we analyze condensation defects obtained from finite-region gauging and reconstruct the gauging map from movement operators. Finally, we apply the same framework to subgroup gauging, focusing on the example of gauging $\mathbb Z_2\subset \mathbb Z_4$. This produces a dual symmetry carrying a mixed anomaly, which we diagnose on the lattice through symmetry fractionalization on condensation defects. Our results provide an explicit lattice framework for studying topological interfaces, condensation defects, and the associated anomalies arising from gauging in higher-dimensional systems.
summary:
我们研究在更高维度具有广义对称性的晶格模型中测量界面及其缺陷后代。我们构建显式接口哈密顿量来衡量 $(2+1)d$ 中的 $\mathbb Z_2^{(0)}$ 对称性和 $(3+1)d$ 中的 $\mathbb Z_2^{(1)}$ 对称性。在更高的维度中，特别是在存在更高形式的对称性的情况下，测量界面的拓扑性质被约束希尔伯特空间取决于界面位置的事实所掩盖。我们通过引入作用于公共无约束希尔伯特空间的运动算子来解决这个问题，该空间传输接口哈密顿量和相关约束。作为应用，我们分析了从有限区域测量获得的凝结缺陷，并从运动算子重建测量图。最后，我们将相同的框架应用于子组衡量，重点关注衡量 $\mathbb Z_2\subset \mathbb Z_4$ 的示例。这产生了带有混合异常的对偶对称性，我们通过凝结缺陷的对称分式在晶格上进行诊断。

我们的结果为研究拓扑界面、凝聚缺陷以及在高维系统中测量时产生的相关异常提供了一个明确的晶格框架。

title: Bridging perturbation and variational approaches in brittle fracture
abstract: We present a variational reduced-order model for three-dimensional coplanar propagation of sharp cracks in heterogeneous perfectly brittle solids under mixed-mode I+II+III loading. The approach connects the variational fracture formulation of Francfort and Marigo (1998) and the perturbation theory of Rice (1985) by computing equilibrium crack-front configurations through minimization of the total energy defined as the sum of (i) the elastic potential energy, evaluated asymptotically from front deformations, and (ii) the dissipated energy, set by the fracture energy field. The potential energy and its derivatives are evaluated efficiently using the Fast Fourier Transform. The resulting nonconvex box-constrained minimization problem is solved with a matrix-free Newton conjugate gradient algorithm with a trust region and physics-based preconditioning, enforcing irreversibility while resolving energy barriers and long-range elastic interactions. We validate our implementation against newly derived analytical solutions. We then perform 116,000 large-scale simulations of tensile and shear crack propagation in disordered media to quantify the impact of finite-size effects, disorder intensity, and mode mixity. The simulations reproduce the transition from smooth to intermittent crack growth, and show that mode mixity has limited influence on the onset of intermittency but induces quasi-elliptic fronts in mixed II+III loading. They reveal a size-dependent crossover from disorder-induced weakening to toughening controlled by the emergence of depinning instabilities.
summary:
我们提出了混合模式 I+II+III 加载下异质完全脆性固体中锐裂纹三维共面扩展的变分降阶模型。该方法将 Francfort 和 Marigo (1998) 的变分断裂公式与 Rice (1985) 的摄动理论联系起来，通过最小化总能量来计算平衡裂纹前沿配置，该总能量定义为 (i) 弹性势能（根据前沿变形渐进评估）和 (ii) 由断裂能场设定的耗散能之和。使用快速傅里叶变换可以有效地评估势能及其导数。由此产生的非凸框约束最小化问题通过具有信赖域和基于物理的预处理的无矩阵牛顿共轭梯度算法来解决，在解决能量障碍和远程弹性相互作用的同时强制不可逆性。我们根据新得出的分析解决方案验证我们的实施。

然后，我们对无序介质中的拉伸和剪切裂纹扩展进行了 116,000 次大规模模拟，以量化有限尺寸效应、无序强度和模式混合的影响。模拟再现了从平滑裂纹扩展到间歇性裂纹扩展的转变，并表明模式混合对间歇性开始的影响有限，但在混合 II+III 载荷中会产生准椭圆形前沿。它们揭示了从无序引起的弱化到由脱钉不稳定性的出现控制的增韧的尺寸依赖性交叉。

title: Using a spin-triplet encoding to enhance shuttling fidelities in Si/SiGe quantum wells
abstract: Spatial variations of the valley splitting in a quantum well present a key challenge for conveyor-mode shuttling of electron spins in Si/SiGe, giving rise to Landau-Zener-like excitations that cause leakage outside the qubit subspace. Here, we propose an unconventional two-electron qubit encoding, based on valley-singlet states, that is largely immune to Landau-Zener leakage processes. In contrast to single-electron spins, the shuttling fidelity actually improves for small valley splittings, in this case. We show that high fidelities can be achieved without applying any special procedures, such as fine-tuning of the shuttling path.
summary: 量子阱中谷分裂的空间变化对 Si/SiGe 中电子自旋的传送模式穿梭提出了关键挑战，产生了类似朗道-齐纳的激发，导致量子位子空间之外的泄漏。在这里，我们提出了一种基于谷单态的非常规双电子量子位编码，它在很大程度上不受朗道-齐纳泄漏过程的影响。与单电子自旋相比，在这种情况下，小谷分裂的穿梭保真度实际上有所提高。我们证明，无需应用任何特殊程序（例如穿梭路径的微调）即可实现高保真度。

title: Negative Differential Resistance and Ultra-High TMR in Altermagnetic Tunnel Junctions
abstract: Altermagnets can replace ferromagnets in tunnel junctions, yielding large tunneling magnetoresistance, ultrafast switching, and low-power functionality. While most studies explore the linear-response regime, interesting features emerge at finite bias, where the peculiar electronic structure of altermagnets gives rise to complex non-linear behaviour. Using non-equilibrium Green's functions implemented with density functional theory, we predict that a large low-bias negative differential resistance can be observed in an altermagnetic tunnel junction. Our proposed junction incorporates the orbital-ordered altermagnet KV2Se2O, whose quasi-2D Fermi surface plays a crucial role in realizing the negative differential resistance. Upon the application of a finite bias voltage, the current in the parallel configuration first increases sharply and then decreases, to be almost completely suppressed at around 0.14 V. At the same time, the antiparallel configuration displays a monotonic current-voltage curve. This behaviour, in addition to the negative differential resistance, supports a large tunneling magnetoresistance with sign inversion at 0.13 V. Our results suggest that altermagnetic tunnel junctions can be used as components in applications requiring strong non-linear response at low bias.
summary:
交替磁体可以取代隧道结中的铁磁体，产生大的隧道磁阻、超快开关和低功耗功能。虽然大多数研究探索线性响应机制，但在有限偏置下出现了有趣的特征，其中交流磁体的特殊电子结构引起了复杂的非线性行为。使用密度泛函理论实现的非平衡格林函数，我们预测可以在互磁隧道结中观察到大的低偏置负微分电阻。我们提出的结采用了轨道有序交替磁体 KV2Se2O，其准二维费米面在实现负微分电阻中起着至关重要的作用。在施加有限偏置电压时，并联配置中的电流首先急剧增加然后减小，几乎完全被抑制在0.14 V左右。同时，反并联配置显示出单调的电流-电压曲线。除了负微分电阻之外，这种行为还支持在 0.13 V 时符号反转的大隧道磁阻。

我们的结果表明，交变磁隧道结可以用作需要低偏置下强非线性响应的应用中的组件。

title: Activity enhances transport while competing interactions preserve structure in colloidal microphase formers
abstract: Colloidal models with short-range attraction and long range repulsion (SALR) have been extensively studied using theoretical and simulations methods due to their rich and universal equilibrium phase behavior. Using Brownian Dynamics simulations, we study the dynamical phase behavior of active suspensions in which colloidal particles interact with each other via a SALR potential. Upon increasing the self-propulsion force of the particles, we observed that the structural transitions the active suspension undergoes resemble those observed in its passive counterpart by increasing the temperature of the thermal bath. However, when looking at the transport properties of active and passive suspensions with similar structure, we observed a clear mismatch. We demonstrated that increasing the activity enhances the particles mobility within the SALR fluid when simultaneously preserves the structure. This leads to a structure-dynamics decoupling induced by the activity whereas at the same time highlights the structural memory of SALR potentials under non-equilibrium conditions.
summary: 由于具有丰富且普遍的平衡相行为，具有短程吸引力和长程排斥（SALR）的胶体模型已被广泛使用理论和模拟方法进行研究。使用布朗动力学模拟，我们研究了活性悬浮液的动态相行为，其中胶体颗粒通过 SALR 势相互作用。在增加颗粒的自推进力时，我们观察到主动悬浮液经历的结构转变类似于通过提高热浴温度在被动悬浮液中观察到的结构转变。然而，当观察具有相似结构的主动和被动悬架的传输特性时，我们观察到明显的不匹配。我们证明，增加活性可以增强 SALR 流体内的颗粒流动性，同时保留结构。这导致了由活性引起的结构动力学解耦，同时突出了 SALR 电位在非平衡条件下的结构记忆。

title: Grassmann tensor networks
abstract: Developing non-perturbative methods to reveal exotic properties of strongly correlated fermionic systems remains one of the most essential tasks of theoretical physics. Tensor network methods with Grassmann algebra offer powerful numerical tools for fermionic many-body systems in the coherent-state path-integral representation. Despite their vast potential for both condensed-matter and particle-physics communities, Grassmann tensor network methods are somewhat underexploited in practical simulations. In this work, we provide a detailed, self-contained introduction to Grassmann tensor network methods, from the basics of the Grassmann tensor operations to the Grassmannization of typical tensor network algorithms. Furthermore, the resulting Grassmann tensor network methods are validated in several interesting models in both particle physics and condensed matter physics.
summary: 开发非微扰方法来揭示强相关费米子系统的奇异特性仍然是理论物理学最重要的任务之一。具有格拉斯曼代数的张量网络方法为相干态路径积分表示中的费米子多体系统提供了强大的数值工具。尽管格拉斯曼张量网络方法在凝聚态物理和粒子物理领域具有巨大的潜力，但在实际模拟中尚未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们对 Grassmann 张量网络方法进行了详细、独立的介绍，从 Grassmann 张量运算的基础知识到典型张量网络算法的 Grassmann 化。此外，由此产生的格拉斯曼张量网络方法在粒子物理学和凝聚态物理学的几个有趣模型中得到了验证。

title: Matrix-noise Jacobians in stochastic-calculus inference and optimal paths
abstract: Multiplicative noise makes stochastic dynamics depend on how the white-noise limit is interpreted. In multidimensional systems with matrix-valued noise amplitudes $\sigma(x)$, this dependence includes a local Jacobian contribution that is absent from the scalar examples most often used to build intuition. We formulate a finite-step path-likelihood framework for $\theta$-discretized diffusions and show that its short-time expansion isolates the scalar $J_\sigma=\partial_j\sigma_{ik}\partial_i\sigma_{jk}-(\partial_i\sigma_{ik})(\partial_l\sigma_{lk})$. For a specified noise-amplitude representation $\sigma$, this quantity vanishes in one-dimensional, scalar-isotropic, and strictly diagonal cases, but can survive when state-dependent noise directions mix different components. We then test its consequences using paired comparisons that hold the drift, diffusion matrix, interpolation point, and Gaussian increment term fixed. In Model A, removing only the off-diagonal determinant contribution produces a shift in the fitted stochastic prescription that vanishes when $J_\sigma=0$. In Model B, removing the corresponding state-dependent action term changes a stable optimized transition path. These results show that a genuinely matrix-noise part of the short-time path measure can survive the scalar cancellations familiar from simpler settings and produce measurable changes in fitted stochastic prescriptions and Onsager--Machlup paths.
summary:
乘性噪声使得随机动力学取决于如何解释白噪声极限。在具有矩阵值噪声幅度 $\sigma(x)$ 的多维系统中，这种依赖性包括局部雅可比贡献，而最常用于构建直觉的标量示例中不存在这种贡献。我们为 $\theta$ 离散扩散制定了有限步路径似然框架，并表明其短时展开隔离了标量 $J_\sigma=\partial_j\sigma_{ik}\partial_i\sigma_{jk}-(\partial_i\sigma_{ik})(\partial_l\sigma_{lk})$。对于指定的噪声幅度表示$\sigma$，该量在一维、标量各向同性和严格对角线的情况下消失，但当状态相关的噪声方向混合不同分量时可以保留。然后，我们使用固定漂移、扩散矩阵、插值点和高斯增量项的配对比较来测试其结果。在模型 A 中，仅删除非对角线行列式贡献会产生拟合随机处方的偏移，该偏移在 $J_\sigma=0$ 时消失。在模型 B 中，删除相应的状态相关动作项会改变稳定的优化转换路径。

这些结果表明，短时路径测量的真正矩阵噪声部分可以经受住从简单设置中熟悉的标量抵消，并在拟合随机处方和 Onsager-Machlup 路径中产生可测量的变化。

title: Selective Octahedral Accommodation of Cr$^{3+}$ and Weak Magnetic Connectivity in the Sugilite Analogue KNa$_2$Cr$_2$Li$_3$Si$_{12}$O$_{30}$
abstract: We report the synthesis of the Cr analogue of sugilite, KNa$_2$Cr$_2$Li$_3$Si$_{12}$O$_{30}$, in the milarite-type framework. Rietveld refinement of a composition-conserving antisite model gives $x = 0.0024(18)$ in KNa$_2$[Cr$_{2-x}$Li$_x$][Li$_{3-x}$Cr$_x$]Si$_{12}$O$_{30}$, corresponding to a T2-site Cr occupancy of $0.0008(6)$. X-ray MEM analysis shows no detectable Cr-like density at T2. Magnetic susceptibility indicates weak antiferromagnetic interactions with $\theta_{\mathrm{W}} = -4.78(7)$ K and no ordering above 1.8 K.
summary: 我们报道了在米拉瑞特型框架中合成苏纪石的 Cr 类似物 KNa$_2$Cr$_2$Li$_3$Si$_{12}$O$_{30}$。成分守恒反位点模型的 Rietveld 精修给出 KNa$_2$[Cr$_{2-x}$Li$_x$][Li$_{3-x}$Cr$_x$]Si$_{12}$O$_{30}$ 中的 $x = 0.0024(18)$，对应于 T2 位 Cr 占用率为 $0.0008(6)$。 X 射线 MEM 分析显示在 T2 时没有检测到类 Cr 密度。磁化率表明与 $\theta_{\mathrm{W}} = -4.78(7)$ K 存在弱反铁磁相互作用，并且在 1.8 K 以上没有排序。

title: Ultrafast Critical Slowing of Spin Dynamics and Emergent Nonequilibrium Fano Interference in Fe3GeTe2
abstract: Fe$_3$GeTe$_2$ is a prototypical metallic van der Waals ferromagnet with itinerant magnetism and a highly tunable Curie temperature, yet how electronic excitations couple to spin and lattice degrees of freedom across its magnetic transition remains largely unexplored. Here, we use two-color pump-probe reflectivity to investigate the coupled electronic, spin, and lattice dynamics. The time-resolved reflectivity exhibits a tri-exponential relaxation, in which the intermediate component shows an anomaly near the Curie temperature due to enhanced interlayer spin-lattice interactions, while the slowest component displays pronounced critical slowing down with an exponent of ~ 0.3, revealing non-universal relaxation dynamics associated with intralayer spin correlations. Furthermore, we observe an emergent nonequilibrium A1g phonon Fano asymmetry that is suppressed in the ferromagnetic phase but anomalously enhanced in the paramagnetic regime, driven by thermally activated anharmonic decay pathways that bridge the kinematic gap to a hot electronic continuum. The pronounced enhancement of the acoustic strain pulse amplitude near T$_c$ further evidences robust magnetoelastic coupling. Overall, our results reveal how magnetic order governs the interplay among critical spin dynamics, electronic continuum excitations, and lattice response in metallic van der Waals ferromagnets
summary:
Fe$_3$GeTe$_2$ 是一种典型的金属范德华铁磁体，具有巡回磁性和高度可调的居里温度，但电子激励如何在其磁转变过程中与自旋和晶格自由度耦合仍然很大程度上尚未被探索。在这里，我们使用双色泵浦探针反射率来研究耦合的电子、自旋和晶格动力学。时间分辨反射率表现出三指数弛豫，其中中间分量由于层间自旋晶格相互作用增强而在居里温度附近表现出异常，而最慢的分量则显示出明显的临界减速，指数约为0.3，揭示了与层内自旋相关性相关的非通用弛豫动力学。此外，我们观察到一种新兴的非平衡 A1g 声子 Fano 不对称性，它在铁磁相中受到抑制，但在顺磁态中异常增强，这是由热激活的非简谐衰变路径驱动的，该路径将运动间隙与热电子连续体桥接起来。 T$_c$ 附近声应变脉冲幅度的显着增强进一步证明了强大的磁弹性耦合。

总的来说，我们的结果揭示了磁序如何控制金属范德华铁磁体中临界自旋动力学、电子连续激发和晶格响应之间的相互作用

title: Helium Bubbles in Liquid Lead Lithium Solutions: Pressure Inhomogeneities at Interfaces and Non Ideal Mixture Effects
abstract: The extremely low solubility of helium in liquid metals may lead to rapid supersaturation, promoting spontaneous formation of helium bubbles by nucleation. Once nucleated, the stability of these bubbles is governed by the properties of the helium liquid metal interface. In particular, interfacial tension between the immiscible phases controls bubble interactions and induces local pressure inhomogeneities. This work is motivated by the need of a better understanding of helium bubble formation in liquid Pb Li alloys, which are of particular relevance for the design of breeding blankets in the future nuclear fusion reactors. We employ classical molecular dynamics simulations to investigate helium segregation in a range of lead lithium systems, including the limiting cases of pure lead and pure lithium. Changes in local pressure are evaluated from direct mechanical calculations, enabling the characterization of interfacial properties. Interfacial tension and radius of the bubble are subsequently determined across multiple thermodynamic conditions, spanning temperatures starting near the melting points of the constituent metals up to 1021 K. The impact of curvature and composition of the alloy on the interfacial behaviour are also investigated.
summary:
氦在液态金属中的极低溶解度可能导致快速过饱和，从而通过成核促进氦气泡的自发形成。一旦成核，这些气泡的稳定性就受到氦液态金属界面的特性的控制。特别是，不混溶相之间的界面张力控制气泡相互作用并引起局部压力不均匀性。这项工作的动机是需要更好地了解液态铅锂合金中氦气泡的形成，这对于未来核聚变反应堆中的增殖毯的设计特别相关。我们采用经典的分子动力学模拟来研究一系列铅锂系统中的氦偏析，包括纯铅和纯锂的极限情况。通过直接机械计算评估局部压力的变化，从而能够表征界面特性。随后在多个热力学条件下确定气泡的界面张力和半径，温度范围从接近组成金属的熔点开始直至 1021 K。

还研究了合金的曲率和成分对界面行为的影响。

title: Structural, electronic, and optical properties of hexagonal GeSn from density functional theory
abstract: Unlike cubic GeSn, which requires a high Sn concentration to undergo an indirect-to-direct bandgap transition, lonsdaleite (2H) germanium is an intrinsic direct-gap semiconductor. We employ first-principles density functional theory to investigate the structural, electronic, and optical properties of 2H-Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_{x}$ random alloys in the dilute Sn regime ($x \le 0.10$). The extended alloy disorder is modeled using 48-atom special quasirandom structure (SQS) supercells, and the coherent effective band structure is recovered via spectral band unfolding. We show that 2H-Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_{x}$ maintains a direct bandgap at the $\Gamma$ point across the studied composition range, exhibiting a strong bandgap bowing that shifts the fundamental absorption edge into the mid-infrared. Evaluation of the optical transition matrix elements reveals a giant polarization anisotropy dictated by spin-orbit coupling. The fundamental transition is strongly dipole-allowed for light polarized perpendicular to the crystal $c$-axis, an optical selection rule that is robustly preserved despite the random alloy disorder breaking the symmetry. These results demonstrate that hexagonal GeSn bypasses the compositional threshold limitations of the cubic phase, providing a highly tunable direct-gap system for infrared optoelectronics.
summary:
与立方 GeSn 不同，立方 GeSn 需要高 Sn 浓度才能经历间接到直接带隙跃迁，而长石 (2H) 锗是一种本征直接带隙半导体。我们采用第一原理密度泛函理论来研究稀 Sn 状态 ($x \le 0.10$) 中 2H-Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_{x}$ 随机合金的结构、电子和光学性质。使用 48 原子特殊准随机结构 (SQS) 超晶胞对扩展合金无序进行建模，并通过谱带展开恢复相干有效能带结构。我们表明，2H-Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_{x}$ 在整个研究的成分范围内的 $\Gamma$ 点保持直接带隙，表现出强烈的带隙弯曲，将基本吸收边缘转移到中红外区域。光学跃迁矩阵元素的评估揭示了由自旋轨道耦合决定的巨大偏振各向异性。对于垂直于晶体 $c$ 轴偏振的光，基本跃迁是强烈偶极子允许的，尽管随机合金无序破坏了对称性，但该光学选择规则仍被牢固地保留。

这些结果表明，六方 GeSn 绕过了立方相的组成阈值限制，为红外光电子学提供了高度可调的直接带隙系统。

title: Magnesium-graphene interphase boundaries created by high-pressure torsion enhance hydrogen storage kinetics:Mechanisms and significance of activation energy and frequency factor
abstract: A strategy to overcome sluggish hydrogenation/dehydrogenation of magnesium is demonstrated by creating magnesium-graphene interphase boundaries via high-pressure torsion (HPT). HPT reduces the grain size of pure magnesium from 1 mm to 850 nm, with 70% of grain boundaries having high misorientation angles. Graphene addition leads to even finer grain sizes of 10-500 nm with a bimodal morphology. The magnesium-graphene composites exhibit superior kinetics at 623 K while maintaining high air resistance. Kinetic modeling reveals that the rate-controlling mechanism transits from interfacial reaction in coarse-grained magnesium to atomic diffusion in magnesium-graphene nanocomposites. Kissinger analysis shows that the activation energy for hydrogen desorption remains unchanged at 145 +/- 2 kJ/mol, regardless of the presence of grain or interphase boundaries. However, the frequency factor (number of successful attempts to overcome the activation energy) increases with the generation of interfaces, which serve as sites for hydrogen diffusion and heterogeneous metal/hydride nucleation. These findings highlight the impact of interphase boundary engineering via severe plastic deformation for enhancing the kinetics and air resistance of hydrogen storage materials.
summary:
通过高压扭转（HPT）创建镁-石墨烯界面，证明了克服镁氢化/脱氢缓慢的策略。 HPT 将纯镁的晶粒尺寸从 1 mm 减小到 850 nm，其中 70% 的晶界具有高取向差角。添加石墨烯可产生 10-500 nm 的更细晶粒尺寸，并具有双峰形态。镁-石墨烯复合材料在 623 K 下表现出优异的动力学性能，同时保持高空气阻力。动力学模型揭示了速率控制机制从粗晶镁中的界面反应转变为镁-石墨烯纳米复合材料中的原子扩散。基辛格分析表明，无论是否存在晶粒或相间边界，氢解吸的活化能都保持在 145 +/- 2 kJ/mol 不变。然而，频率因子（克服活化能的成功尝试次数）随着界面的生成而增加，界面充当氢扩散和异质金属/氢化物成核的位点。

这些发现强调了相间边界工程通过剧烈塑性变形对增强储氢材料的动力学和空气阻力的影响。

title: Observation of an aperiodic polariton monotile
abstract: A plethora of unconventional localization phenomena and fractal features of linear spectrum observed in quasiperiodic structures have been accompanied by a long-standing quest for the geometrical elements and structures that permit tilings of the plane, but only in a non-periodic manner. Until 2024, it was believed that such quasiperiodic structures, or quasicrystals, could only be composed of at least two different tiles. Surprisingly, a newly discovered class of quasicrystals requires only one elementary monotile. However, its physical realization and study of propagating coherent excitations in this novel setting remained elusive. Here we optically sculpt aperiodic quasicrystals composed of "einstein" monotiles in an inorganic microcavity and observe nontrivial relative phases of the exciton-polariton condensates nonresonantly excited at the vertices of each monotile. Utilizing energy-resolved tomography in momentum-space, we reveal the formation of distinct Bragg peaks with six-fold symmetry and Dirac-like spectral fingerprints, intrinsic to the underlying graphene-like structure, while interferometric phase reconstruction shows a nontrivial synchronization pattern distinct from both periodic triangular lattices and Penrose quasicrystals. Our work demonstrates that monotiles can be converted into a programmable driven-dissipative artificial material, where long-range coherence coexists with enforced geometric aperiodicity, producing synchronization and spectral responses distinct from both periodic and conventional quasicrystalline tilings.
summary:
在准周期结构中观察到的大量非常规定位现象和线性光谱的分形特征一直伴随着对允许平面平铺的几何元素和结构的长期探索，但只能以非周期方式进行。直到 2024 年，人们都认为这种准周期结构或准晶体只能由至少两种不同的瓦片组成。令人惊讶的是，一类新发现的准晶体只需要一个基本单片。然而，它的物理实现和在这种新颖的环境中传播相干激发的研究仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们在无机微腔中光学雕刻由“爱因斯坦”单片组成的非周期准晶体，并观察在每个单片顶点非共振激发的激子-极化子凝聚体的非平凡相对相位。

利用动量空间中的能量分辨断层扫描，我们揭示了具有六重对称性和类狄拉克光谱指纹的独特布拉格峰的形成，这是底层类石墨烯结构所固有的，而干涉相位重建显示了与周期性三角晶格和彭罗斯准晶体不同的非平凡同步模式。我们的工作表明，单片可以转化为可编程驱动耗散人造材料，其中长程相干性与强制几何非周期性共存，产生与周期性和传统准晶镶嵌不同的同步和光谱响应。

title: Conditional probability density functional theory for solids
abstract: A recently developed approach, conditional probability density functional theory (CP-DFT), yields direct access to the exchange-correlation hole of a system, an important correlation function that is not available from any standard DFT calculation. We present the first results for extended materials with periodic boundary conditions. We demonstrate that CP-DFT works on weakly correlated materials (Na, Si). When applied to the prototypical Kagome material $CsV_3Sb_5$, we find $d$-orbital correlations that are not captured by standard DFT. Such distribution leads to a positive finding probability between two separated electrons and an enhanced charge density wave signal, suggesting a useful approach for strongly correlated systems.
summary: 最近开发的方法，条件概率密度泛函理论 (CP-DFT)，可以直接访问系统的交换相关洞，这是任何标准 DFT 计算都无法获得的重要相关函数。我们展示了具有周期性边界条件的扩展材料的第一个结果。我们证明 CP-DFT 适用于弱相关材料（Na、Si）。当应用于原型 Kagome 材料 $CsV_3Sb_5$ 时，我们发现标准 DFT 未捕获的 $d$ 轨道相关性。这种分布导致两个分离电子之间的正发现概率和增强的电荷密度波信号，这为强相关系统提出了一种有用的方法。

title: Crossover and universality breaking in the dilute Baxter-Wu model
abstract: The critical behavior of the Baxter-Wu model belongs to the universality class of the four-state Potts model. While the introduction of annealed vacancies does not alter the criticality of the four-state Potts model, the dilute Baxter-Wu model has remained the subject of several competing scenarios. Here we investigate the phase diagram of the spin-$1$ Baxter-Wu model in the presence of a crystal field using transfer-matrix calculations and large-scale Monte Carlo simulations. Our results provide strong evidence for continuously varying critical exponents at finite dilution and reveal a crossover to first-order behavior. Along the line of continuous transitions, the central charge remains close to $c=1$, while the scaling dimensions systematically deviate from the spin-$1/2$ limit as the crystal field increases, eventually giving way to a first-order regime at strong fields. These findings resolve previous ambiguities and establish a consistent picture of the critical behavior of the dilute spin-$1$ Baxter-Wu model.
summary: Baxter-Wu 模型的临界行为属于四态 Potts 模型的普遍性类。虽然退火空位的引入并没有改变四态 Potts 模型的关键性，但稀释的 Baxter-Wu 模型仍然是几个竞争场景的主题。在这里，我们使用传递矩阵计算和大规模蒙特卡罗模拟研究了存在晶体场的自旋 $1$ Baxter-Wu 模型的相图。我们的结果为有限稀释下连续变化的临界指数提供了有力的证据，并揭示了与一阶行为的交叉。沿着连续跃迁线，中心电荷保持接近 $c=1$，而随着晶体场的增加，缩放尺寸系统地偏离自旋 $1/2$ 极限，最终让位于强场下的一阶状态。这些发现解决了之前的模糊性，并建立了稀释旋转 $1$ Baxter-Wu 模型关键行为的一致图景。

title: Fluctuation-Dissipation Framework for Size-Dependent Surface Tension
abstract: The size-dependent liquid-vapor surface tension controls phase change, wetting, and transport at nanoscales, yet its first curvature correction, the Tolman length, remains difficult to determine. We develop a thermodynamic and statistical-mechanical framework that relates this correction to bulk response properties of a one-component liquid near liquid-vapor coexistence. For curved interfaces, the analysis considers two local formulations of the same capillary-chemical balance, in excess pressures and in relative density deviations. For weakly compressible liquids in the regime emphasized here, the adopted asymmetric density-based formulation is the practically relevant one, with finite-curvature effects entering through vapor supersaturation under capillary equilibrium. At coexistence, the planar-limit value of the same Tolman length reduces to a combination of the liquid isothermal compressibility and its pressure derivative and can be recast as a bulk fluctuation-response observable of the homogeneous liquid in the isothermal-isobaric ensemble. In this representation, the planar-limit coefficient is determined by second and third central moments of the volume distribution, equivalently by the pressure response of the relative fluctuation width. For water, homogeneous (N,P,T) simulations of SPC/E and TIP4P/2005 sample the bulk liquid, not an explicit liquid-vapor interface, and yield estimates near -0.7 Angstrom at 300 K. An independent evaluation based on the IAPWS-IF97 industrial formulation gives -0.713 +/- 0.004 Angstrom at the same coexistence state and predicts a weakly nonmonotonic temperature dependence along coexistence. Beyond water, the framework applies to other one-component liquids in regimes where an accurate thermal equation of state or sufficiently converged bulk volume statistics are available.
summary:
尺寸相关的液-汽表面张力控制着纳米尺度的相变、润湿和传输，但其第一个曲率校正，即托尔曼长度，仍然难以确定。我们开发了一种热力学和统计力学框架，该框架将这种校正与接近液-气共存的单组分液体的整体响应特性联系起来。对于弯曲界面，分析考虑了相同毛细管化学平衡的两种局部公式：超压和相对密度偏差。对于此处强调的弱可压缩液体，所采用的基于不对称密度的公式实际上是相关的，在毛细管平衡下通过蒸气过饱和进入有限曲率效应。在共存时，相同托尔曼长度的平面极限值减少为液体等温压缩性及其压力导数的组合，并且可以被重铸为等温-等压系综中均匀液体的体涨落响应可观测值。

在此表示中，平面极限系数由体积分布的第二和第三中心矩确定，等效地由相对波动宽度的压力响应确定。对于水，SPC/E 和 TIP4P/2005 的均质 (N,P,T) 模拟对大量液体进行采样，而不是明确的液-气界面，并且在 300 K 时产量估计值接近 -0.7 埃。基于 IAPWS-IF97 工业公式的独立评估给出了在相同共存状态下的 -0.713 +/- 0.004 埃，并预测了弱非单调温度依赖性共存。除了水之外，该框架还适用于可以获得准确的热状态方程或充分收敛的体积统计数据的体系中的其他单组分液体。

title: Defect annihilation mechanism in the formation of dodecagonal quasicrystals
abstract: Understanding defect evolution is essential to the structural stability of quasicrystals, yet the kinetics of defect repair remain poorly understood. Here, by combining the string method and the spring pair method, we determine the minimum energy path from defective to defect-free dodecagonal quasicrystals using a particle model with the Lennard-Jones-Gauss potential. We find that defect annihilation proceeds via three stages: phason flip, aggregation and decomposition of shield-like defects. These sequential transformations are driven by potential energy gradients and accompanied by an increase in structural symmetry. The three stages act synergistically in promoting defect annihilation, offering new insights into the microscopic repair mechanisms of quasicrystals.
summary: 了解缺陷演化对于准晶体的结构稳定性至关重要，但缺陷修复的动力学仍然知之甚少。在这里，通过结合弦法和弹簧对法，我们使用具有 Lennard-Jones-Gauss 势的粒子模型确定从有缺陷到无缺陷十二角准晶体的最小能量路径。我们发现缺陷消灭通过三个阶段进行：相子翻转、盾状缺陷的聚集和分解。这些连续的转变是由势能梯度驱动的，并伴随着结构对称性的增加。这三个阶段在促进缺陷消除方面协同作用，为准晶体的微观修复机制提供了新的见解。

title: Multiband Superconductivity in the Exactly Solvable Hatsugai-Kohmoto Model
abstract: Multiband superconductivity gives rise to a rich landscape of possible pairing states. Here we study superconductivity in the multiband extension of the Hatsugai-Kohmoto model, an exactly solvable model of correlated electrons with momentum-local interactions, which provides a minimal framework to explore the interplay of strong correlations, orbital structure and pairing symmetry. Focusing on a two-orbital system with point-group symmetry $\rm D_{4h}$, we classify the symmetry-allowed superconducting gap structures, taking into account spin, orbital and momentum degrees of freedom. We further compute the critical temperature and the superconducting order parameter for selected pairing channels as functions of interaction and pairing strength within a mean-field treatment. Our results provide a systematic framework for analyzing superconductivity in the orbital Hatsugai-Kohmoto model and extend symmetry-based approaches to correlated multiband settings.
summary: 多带超导产生了丰富的可能配对状态。在这里，我们研究了 Hatsugai-Kohmoto 模型的多能带扩展中的超导性，该模型是具有动量局域相互作用的相关电子的精确可解模型，它为探索强相关性、轨道结构和配对对称性的相互作用提供了一个最小的框架。着眼于具有点群对称性 $\rm D_{4h}$ 的双轨道系统，我们对允许对称的超导间隙结构进行分类，同时考虑自旋、轨道和动量自由度。我们进一步计算选定配对通道的临界温度和超导序参数，作为平均场处理中相互作用和配对强度的函数。我们的结果为分析轨道 Hatsugai-Kohmoto 模型中的超导性提供了一个系统框架，并将基于对称性的方法扩展到相关的多频带设置。

title: Electron - acoustic phonons scattering in quantum wells in a tilted quantizing magnetic field
abstract: Electron scattering by longitudinal acoustic phonons in a quantizing magnetic field is considered. Expressions for the scattering rate in a magnetic field tilted to the quantum well layers are derived. By analyzing these expressions, trends in the behavior of the scattering rate are established with changes in the magnetic field strength and orientation, as well as the potential profile of the quantum well.
summary: 考虑量子化磁场中纵向声声子的电子散射。推导出倾斜于量子阱层的磁场中的散射率的表达式。通过分析这些表达式，随着磁场强度和方向以及量子阱势分布的变化，建立了散射率行为的趋势。

title: Thermoelectric enhancement from an asymmetric spectral-conductivity cusp in spin-1 chiral fermions
abstract: A recent study showed that, in spin-1 chiral fermion systems composed of two linearly dispersing bands and one trivial band, impurity scattering produces an asymmetric cusp in the spectral conductivity. We demonstrate that this asymmetric cusp markedly enhances the electronic thermoelectric response. Using linear-response theory within the self-consistent Born approximation, we find low-temperature enhancements in both the Seebeck coefficient and the electronic figure of merit. Increasing the curvature of the trivial band further strengthens this cusp-induced enhancement, even though the corresponding density of states becomes smoother. To clarify this mechanism, we introduce a minimal cusp model for the spectral conductivity and show that the enhancement is most pronounced when the cusp is sharp and strongly asymmetric, and when the spectral conductivity at the cusp energy is small.
summary: 最近的一项研究表明，在由两个线性色散带和一个平凡带组成的 spin-1 手性费米子系统中，杂质散射会在光谱电导率中产生不对称尖点。我们证明这种不对称尖点显着增强了电子热电响应。使用自洽玻恩近似中的线性响应理论，我们发现塞贝克系数和电子品质因数均在低温下得到增强。增加平凡带的曲率进一步增强了这种尖点引起的增强，即使相应的态密度变得更平滑。为了阐明这一机制，我们引入了光谱电导率的最小尖点模型，并表明当尖点尖锐且强烈不对称时，以及当尖点能量处的光谱电导率小时，增强最为明显。

title: Lamb Shift of Landau Levels in Two-Dimensional Electron Systems in a Multimode Resonator
abstract: The use of resonators to modify the behavior of electromagnetic systems demonstrates its potential for application in a wide range of problems. However, existing theoretical studies often resort to the single-mode approximation, rarely considering a second resonator mode. In this paper, we show that including a large number of resonator modes in the model significantly enhances the softening effect of the cyclotron frequency of a two-dimensional electron system. We address this problem by demonstrating the possibility of reducing the system to a set of coupled harmonic oscillators and finding the eigenfrequencies of the oscillators. This is made possible by applying the self-energy method for modes in one polarization and the method for finding the eigenvalues of matrices that have undergone first-rank updating for modes in the perpendicular polarization.
summary: 使用谐振器来改变电磁系统的行为表明了其在解决广泛问题上的潜力。然而，现有的理论研究往往采用单模近似，很少考虑第二谐振器模式。在本文中，我们表明，模型中包含大量谐振器模式可显着增强二维电子系统回旋频率的软化效果。我们通过演示将系统简化为一组耦合谐振子并找到振荡器的本征频率的可能性来解决这个问题。这是通过对一个偏振中的模式应用自能方法以及对垂直偏振中的模式应用寻找经过一阶更新的矩阵特征值的方法来实现的。

title: Invertible Symmetry and Spontaneous Duality Breaking in the Transverse-Field Ising Model
abstract: The self-duality of the transverse-field Ising model is an archetype for dualities that, alongside symmetry and topology, are used as an organizing principle throughout modern physics. This duality, however, is not exact. The original and dual models have different symmetries and numbers of ground states, and the duality is implemented by a non-invertible operator giving rise to a non-invertible symmetry at the quantum critical point. Here, we show that by adjusting the model to accommodate open rather than periodic boundary conditions, it allows for an exact duality implemented by a unique invertible operator. In the model with exact duality, the symmetry at the quantum critical point is also exact, and hence invertible. Moreover, we find that the exact duality necessitates the presence of an anomalous edge degree of freedom, thus realizing a duality rather than topology based bulk-boundary correspondence. Finally, the exactness of the duality implies that the spontaneous breakdown of a global symmetry in terms of the original model can equivalently be described as spontaneously breaking a local symmetry in the dual system. We show that this seeming contradiction of Elitzur's theorem can be explained by the original and dual models obtaining different sensitivities to spatially local perturbations in any physical implementation of the Hamiltonian. Although the dual partners are mathematically equivalent, their physical implementations therefore are not. In analogy to the spontaneous breakdown of symmetries, we term this emergent distinction due to arbitrarily small environmental influences spontaneous duality breaking.
summary:
横向场伊辛模型的自对偶性是对偶性的原型，它与对称性和拓扑一起被用作整个现代物理学的组织原理。然而，这种二元性并不准确。原始模型和对偶模型具有不同的对称性和基态数量，并且对偶性是通过不可逆算子实现的，从而在量子临界点处产生不可逆对称性。在这里，我们表明，通过调整模型以适应开放边界条件而不是周期性边界条件，它允许由独特的可逆算子实现精确的对偶性。在具有精确对偶性的模型中，量子临界点处的对称性也是精确的，因此是可逆的。此外，我们发现精确的对偶性需要存在异常边缘自由度，从而实现对偶性而不是基于拓扑的体边界对应。最后，对偶性的精确性意味着原始模型中全局对称性的自发破缺可以等效地描述为对偶系统中局部对称性的自发破缺。

我们表明，埃利祖尔定理的这种看似矛盾可以通过原始模型和对偶模型在哈密顿量的任何物理实现中获得对空间局部扰动的不同敏感性来解释。尽管对偶伙伴在数学上是等效的，但它们的物理实现却并非如此。与对称性的自发破坏类似，我们将这种由于任意小的环境影响自发二元性破坏而出现的区别称为自发的二元性破坏。

title: An Effective Scaling Framework for Non-Adiabatic Mode Dynamics
abstract: This study proposes an effective theoretical framework for non-adiabatic parametric excitation in structured media, incorporating a nonlinear frequency regulator U as a stabilizing mechanism. We introduce the non-adiabaticity parameter as a time-local diagnostic for driven non-stationary systems and analyze its competition with nonlinear spectral detuning through the scaling ratio. The principal physical result is that strongly nonlinear oscillatory systems can exhibit saturation of non-adiabatic parametric amplification: when the nonlinear regulator becomes sufficiently strong, exponential mode growth is dynamically suppressed and the excitation evolves toward a bounded low-occupancy regime. Using numerical verification in an expanded 100-level bosonic Fock basis, we demonstrate a crossover from hyperbolic amplification dynamics toward an effectively bounded response associated with spectral blockade and suppression of higher-order mode occupation. These results suggest that nonlinear spectral stabilization may represent a general mechanism for finite-amplitude non-adiabatic dynamics in driven structured media.
summary: 本研究提出了结构介质中非绝热参数激励的有效理论框架，并结合非线性频率调节器 U 作为稳定机制。我们引入非绝热参数作为驱动非平稳系统的时间局部诊断，并通过缩放比分析其与非线性谱失谐的竞争。主要的物理结果是，强非线性振荡系统可以表现出非绝热参数放大的饱和：当非线性调节器变得足够强时，指数模式增长被动态抑制，并且激励朝着有界低占用状态发展。通过在扩展的 100 级玻色 Fock 基础上进行数值验证，我们证明了从双曲线放大动力学到与光谱封锁和高阶模占用抑制相关的有效有界响应的交叉。这些结果表明非线性谱稳定可能代表驱动结构介质中有限振幅非绝热动力学的一般机制。

title: Multiple Softening Q-vectors Driving a Cascade of CDW Phases in $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$
abstract: Charge density wave (CDW) formation in two-dimensional materials is governed by complex competing lattice instabilities that remain incompletely understood. Here, we investigate the structural evolution of monolayer $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$ using first-principles electronic and phonon calculations. The pristine phase exhibits several imaginary-frequency phonon modes associated with dominant instability wave vectors $\mathrm{Q}_{CDW}$, which generate the first-generation CDW phases. Subsequent phonon analyses reveal that several of these intermediate structures remain dynamically unstable and undergo further symmetry-lowering distortions into larger superstructures. Through iterative phonon-driven relaxations, we identify multiple transformation pathways that converge toward the same low-energy $2\sqrt{3}\times4$ CDW configuration. Although these pathways originate from distinct intermediate CDW states, they ultimately reach nearly degenerate energetically stable phases, demonstrating that different phonon-driven routes can lead to the same ground-state configuration. The results establish a unified phonon-driven cascade mechanism for hierarchical CDW formation in monolayer $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$ and provide a systematic framework for understanding competing ordered phases in low-dimensional quantum materials.
summary:
二维材料中电荷密度波 (CDW) 的形成受到复杂的竞争晶格不稳定性的控制，但这些不稳定性仍不完全清楚。在这里，我们使用第一原理电子和声子计算研究单层 $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$ 的结构演化。原始相位表现出几种与主要不稳定性波矢量 $\mathrm{Q}_{CDW}$ 相关的虚频声子模式，产生第一代 CDW 相位。随后的声子分析表明，其中一些中间结构仍然动态不稳定，并经历进一步的对称性降低扭曲，形成更大的超结构。通过迭代声子驱动的弛豫，我们确定了收敛到相同低能量 $2\sqrt{3}\times4$ CDW 配置的多个转换路径。尽管这些路径源自不同的中间 CDW 态，但它们最终达到近简并的能量稳定相，这表明不同的声子驱动路径可以导致相同的基态配置。

结果建立了一个统一的声子驱动级联机制，用于单层 $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$ 中分层 CDW 的形成，并为理解低维量子材料中的竞争有序相提供了系统框架。

title: Quantifying information flow along a stochastic trajectory
abstract: Stochastic information flow (SIF) quantifies information flow at the trajectory level, overcoming the limitations of conventional symmetric, ensemble-averaged measures. However, computational difficulties have hindered the empirical application of the SIF. In this work, we propose a scalable deep-learning method for estimating the SIF from general time-series data. Its applications to an exactly solvable two-particle model, Kuramoto oscillators, and empirical trajectories of interacting motile cells demonstrate the utility of SIF as a data-driven indicator of cooperative structures.
summary: 随机信息流 (SIF) 在轨迹级别量化信息流，克服了传统对称、整体平均测量的局限性。然而，计算困难阻碍了SIF的实证应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种可扩展的深度学习方法，用于根据一般时间序列数据估计 SIF。其在精确可解的双粒子模型、Kuramoto 振荡器和相互作用运动细胞的经验轨迹中的应用证明了 SIF 作为协作结构的数据驱动指标的实用性。

title: Beyond Explained Variance: A Cautionary Tale of PCA
abstract: We address shortcomings of principal component analysis (PCA) for visualizing high-dimensional data lying on a nonlinear low-dimensional manifold via two-dimensional scatterplots, focusing on a fossil teeth dataset from the early mammalian insectivore Kuehneotherium. While the PCA scatterplot reported by Jolliffe and Cadima (Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society A, 2016) shows clustering in the region where PC2 < 0, our analysis based on t-SNE and persistent homology (PH) reveals a ring-like structure with no evident clustering and intrinsic dimensionality equal to one. We further propose a generative probabilistic-geometric model in which the data are sampled uniformly from a unit circle. Under this model, pairwise cosine distances follow an arcsine distribution, in qualitative agreement with the observed U-shaped distribution, thereby independently supporting the analysis based on tt t-SNE and persistent homology.
summary: 我们解决了主成分分析 (PCA) 的缺点，用于通过二维散点图可视化位于非线性低维流形上的高维数据，重点关注早期哺乳动物食虫动物 Kuehneotherium 的化石牙齿数据集。虽然 Jolliffe 和 Cadima 报告的 PCA 散点图（Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society A，2016）显示在 PC2 < 0 的区域中存在聚类，但我们基于 t-SNE 和持久同源性 (PH) 的分析揭示了一种环状结构，没有明显的聚类且内在维数等于 1。我们进一步提出了一种生成概率几何模型，其中数据从单位圆均匀采样。在该模型下，成对余弦距离遵循反正弦分布，与观察到的 U 形分布定性一致，从而独立支持基于 tt t-SNE 和持久同源性的分析。

title: Emergence of information interference in stochastic systems with non-diagonal noise and switching environments
abstract: Stochastic forces in natural systems are rarely isotropic. From hydrodynamically coupled colloids to chemical reaction networks, noise contributions are inherently correlated. Together with internal interactions and changing environments, they shape the dependencies between the degrees of freedom of real-world systems, as quantified by their mutual information. In this work, we focus on linearized stochastic systems with both non-diagonal noise matrices and stochastically switching environments. We study how their presence leads to the emergence of information interference, so that the total mutual information cannot be decomposed as the sum of the contributions from deterministic interactions, noise anisotropy, and environmental switching alone. We identify two distinct sources of information interference: a static term, arising from the simultaneous presence of deterministic coupling and noise anisotropy; and a dynamic term, emerging from the interplay between internal processes and environmental switches. We then apply this framework to different physical systems. In the presence of switching temperatures, the mutual information disentangles exactly into internal and environmental contributions. When the noise anisotropy arises instead from hydrodynamic interactions, we find that the presence of a shared fluid can either mask or enhance the information stemming from a non-conservative force depending on its degree of non-reciprocity. Finally, in a fuel-driven chemical reaction network, we show that information interference is controlled by the non-equilibrium driving. These results establish a general information-theoretic perspective on how anisotropic noise and environmental variability shape statistical dependencies in stochastic systems.
summary:
自然系统中的随机力很少是各向同性的。从流体动力学耦合的胶体到化学反应网络，噪声的贡献具有内在的相关性。它们与内部交互和不断变化的环境一起，塑造了现实世界系统自由度之间的依赖关系，并通过它们的相互信息进行量化。在这项工作中，我们重点研究具有非对角噪声矩阵和随机切换环境的线性随机系统。我们研究它们的存在如何导致信息干扰的出现，使得总的互信息不能被分解为确定性相互作用、噪声各向异性和环境切换单独贡献的总和。我们确定了两个不同的信息干扰源：静态项，由确定性耦合和噪声各向异性同时存在而产生；一个动态术语，源于内部流程和环境切换之间的相互作用。然后我们将该框架应用于不同的物理系统。

在存在切换温度的情况下，相互信息准确地分解为内部和环境贡献。当噪声各向异性由流体动力相互作用产生时，我们发现共享流体的存在可以掩盖或增强源自非保守力的信息，具体取决于其非互易性程度。最后，在燃料驱动的化学反应网络中，我们表明信息干扰是由非平衡驱动控制的。这些结果建立了关于各向异性噪声和环境变化如何影响随机系统中的统计依赖性的一般信息论视角。

title: Metastable Hyperuniformity at Discontinuous Absorbing Transitions
abstract: Nonequilibrium hyperuniformity can arise either as a steady-state property of driven active fluids or as a critical signature at continuous absorbing transition points in two and three dimensions. Whether analogous structural order exists near discontinuous absorbing transitions, and what mechanism generates it, remains unclear. Here, we show that discontinuous absorbing transitions generically host a metastable hyperuniform regime near the stability limit. Using a facilitated Manna model without center-of-mass conservation, we find anomalous scaling $S(k\to0)\sim k^{1.2}$, which appears only near the metastable regime and disappears both deep in the active phase and in the absorbing phase. This scaling is robust in both two and three dimensions, in contrast to critical hyperuniformity at continuous absorbing transitions. We further formulate a minimal conserved Reggeon field theory that reproduces the same metastable hyperuniform regime and anomalous scaling, demonstrating that the phenomenon does not rely on microscopic update rules but arises from the interplay of nonlinear activation, multiplicative demographic noise, and conserved diffusive fluctuations. These results identify metastable hyperuniformity as a generic pseudo-critical structural signature of discontinuous absorbing transitions coupled to a conserved density.
summary:
非平衡超均匀性可以作为驱动活性流体的稳态特性出现，也可以作为二维和三维连续吸收转变点的关键特征出现。类似的结构顺序是否存在于不连续吸收转变附近，以及产生它的机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们表明，不连续吸收跃迁通常在稳定极限附近存在亚稳态超均匀状态。使用没有质心守恒的简化甘露模型，我们发现异常缩放 $S(k\to0)\sim k^{1.2}$，它仅出现在亚稳态区域附近，并在活性相和吸收相深处消失。与连续吸收跃迁的临界超均匀性相比，这种缩放在二维和三维上都很稳健。我们进一步制定了最小保守的 Reggeon 场理论，它再现了相同的亚稳态超均匀状态和反常尺度，证明该现象不依赖于微观更新规则，而是由非线性激活、乘性人口统计噪声和守恒扩散波动的相互作用产生。

这些结果将亚稳态超均匀性识别为与守恒密度耦合的不连续吸收跃迁的通用伪临界结构特征。

title: Probing Floquet topological phases via non-Hermitian skin effect of reflected waves
abstract: Periodically driven systems host topological phases without static analogs, such as the anomalous Floquet phase characterized by trivial bulk bands yet robust boundary modes. In this work, we investigate the scattering problem of a Floquet Chern insulator and reveal the non-Hermitian skin effect (NHSE) of reflected waves. Using a discrete-time scattering formalism, we demonstrate how the non-Hermitian winding number of the reflection matrix is linked to the bulk Floquet invariant via boundary resonances. This reflected-wave NHSE relies on which quasienergy gap the incident wave resides in, leading to a gap-dependent Goos-Hänchen (GH) shift. We further show that the momentum-integrated GH shift quantitatively yields the Floquet topological invariant of the corresponding gap. Our work highlights a frequency-dependent NHSE of reflected waves in driven systems and provides a real-space scattering approach to identify non-equilibrium topology.
summary: 周期性驱动系统具有没有静态类似物的拓扑相，例如以微不足道的体能带和鲁棒边界模式为特征的异常 Floquet 相。在这项工作中，我们研究了 Floquet Chern 绝缘体的散射问题，并揭示了反射波的非厄米集肤效应 (NHSE)。使用离散时间散射形式，我们演示了反射矩阵的非厄米缠绕数如何通过边界共振与体 Floquet 不变量相关联。这种反射波 NHSE 依赖于入射波所在的准能隙，从而导致依赖于能隙的古斯-汉兴 (GH) 位移。我们进一步表明，动量积分 GH 位移定量地产生了相应间隙的 Floquet 拓扑不变量。我们的工作强调了驱动系统中反射波的频率相关 NHSE，并提供了一种真实空间散射方法来识别非平衡拓扑。

title: Singular spin fluctuations in the strange-metal phase of La2-xSrxCuO4
abstract: Although spin fluctuations are central to the physics of high-Tc cuprates, their relevance to strange-metal behavior in the overdoped regime remains unclear. Here, we use high magnetic fields to suppress superconductivity and an NMR protocol tailored to electronic inhomogeneity to show that the low-energy limit of the dynamical spin susceptibility \chi''(q,omega) at x=0.25 in La2-xSrxCuO4 increases continuously down to our lowest temperatures. This behavior is suggestive of quantum-critical fluctuations, a leading candidate mechanism for strange-metal transport, yet is observed well beyond the spin-stripe critical doping x=0.19. Our data further reveal that the spin dynamics are spatially inhomogeneous, suggesting that nanoscale electronic inhomogeneity may underlie this apparent paradox. These observations provide new insight into the electronic state from which strange-metal behavior emerges.
summary: 尽管自旋涨落是高 Tc 铜酸盐物理学的核心，但它们与过度掺杂状态下奇异金属行为的相关性仍不清楚。在这里，我们使用高磁场来抑制超导性，并使用针对电子不均匀性定制的 NMR 协议来表明，La2-xSrxCuO4 中 x=0.25 处的动态自旋磁化率 \chi''(q,omega) 的低能极限不断增加，直至最低温度。这种行为暗示了量子临界涨落，这是奇异金属输运的主要候选机制，但观察到的结果远远超出了自旋条纹临界掺杂 x=0.19。我们的数据进一步表明，自旋动力学在空间上是不均匀的，这表明纳米级电子不均匀性可能是这种明显悖论的基础。这些观察结果为奇怪金属行为产生的电子态提供了新的见解。

title: Thermodynamic Geometry of two-dimensional square-well fluids
abstract: Thermodynamic geometry of two-dimensional fluids has been investigated using a square-well model as a prototype fluid. A comparison with the three-dimensional case is performed in the subcritical and supercritical domains of thermodynamic space. In the subcritical region, it is found that the R-crossing method has a narrower range of validity for two-dimensional fluids compared to three-dimensional ones. On the other hand, in the supercritical region, an analysis of different Widom lines, including the R Widom line, shows that for two-dimensional fluids these lines extend further into the supercritical region than their three-dimensional counterparts. A similar behavior is observed for the validity of the Clausius--Clapeyron equation in two-dimensional fluids.
summary: 使用方井模型作为原型流体研究了二维流体的热力学几何。在热力学空间的亚临界和超临界域中与三维情况进行了比较。在亚临界区域，我们发现与三维流体相比，R 交叉方法对于二维流体的有效性范围更窄。另一方面，在超临界区域，对包括 R Widom 线在内的不同 Widom 线的分析表明，对于二维流体，这些线比三维流体更深入地延伸到超临界区域。二维流体中克劳修斯-克拉佩龙方程的有效性也观察到了类似的行为。

title: Nonlinear dynamic elastic moduli from equilibrium stress fluctuations
abstract: Fluctuation formulas for elastic and viscoelastic moduli allow their computation from equilibrium molecular dynamics simulations, avoiding explicit nonequilibrium deformation protocols. While such expressions are well established for the quasi-static moduli, and also the linear dynamic moduli, no fluctuation formula exists for the nonlinear time-dependent moduli that govern anharmonic viscoelastic response under finite time-dependent strains. In this work we derive transient-time correlation function expressions for both the linear and the nonlinear dynamic moduli, starting from the DOLLS/SLLOD equations of motion for irrotational motion. The resulting formulas involve equilibrium time correlations of the stress tensor and Born-kinetic terms, and they recover the known quasi-static and linear dynamic results in the appropriate limits.
summary: 弹性和粘弹性模量的涨落公式允许根据平衡分子动力学模拟进行计算，避免显式的非平衡变形协议。虽然准静态模量和线性动态模量的此类表达式已得到很好的建立，但对于控制有限瞬态应变下的非谐粘弹性响应的非线性瞬态模量，不存在涨落公式。在这项工作中，我们从无旋转运动的 DOLLS/SLLOD 运动方程出发，推导出线性和非线性动态模量的瞬态时间相关函数表达式。所得公式涉及应力张量和玻恩动力学项的平衡时间相关性，并且它们在适当的限度内恢复了已知的准静态和线性动态结果。

title: Do Hopfield Networks Dream of Stored Patterns? A Statistical-Mechanical Theory of Dreaming in Multidirectional Associative Memories
abstract: We introduce the Dreaming $L$-directional Associative Memory (DLAM), a multi-layer Hebbian architecture in which off-line dreaming and supervised heteroassociative coupling coexist within a single energy function, placing our approach within the framework of energy-based models (EBMs). The replica-symmetric free energy, derived via the Guerra interpolation scheme, yields self-consistency equations governing the order parameters across the control-parameter space. The effective local field decomposes into signal, intra-layer dreaming noise, and inter-layer noise. Dreaming improves retrieval by differentially attenuating high-eigenvalue interference modes of the empirical correlation matrix, suppressing inter-pattern crosstalk while preserving the signal. Dreaming and inter-layer coupling prove synergistic, opening retrieval regions unreachable by either mechanism alone, as confirmed by Monte Carlo simulations for $L=3$. Their interplay is most pronounced on pattern disentanglement: given a mixture state as input, the network splits the constituent patterns one-per-layer, recovering each modality-specific pattern from a common cue that simultaneously blends noisy evidence from all sensory channels. Phase diagrams are planar projections of the hyperspace $(\alpha,\beta,\rho,t)$-where $\alpha$ is the storage load, $\beta$ the fast-noise inverse temperature, $\rho$ the dataset entropy, and $t$ the sleeping time. In the $(\rho,t)$-plane, the diagrams reveal a data-computation trade-off: off-line consolidation substitutes for additional training data, extending to heteroassociative architectures a phenomenon previously established for autoassociative networks. Enriching the standard Hopfield model with heteroassociativity and dreaming gives rise to EBMs capable of complex tasks beyond classical pattern recognition, contributing to a modern theory of neural information processing.
summary:
我们引入了梦想$L$方向关联记忆（DLAM），这是一种多层Hebbian架构，其中离线梦想和监督异关联耦合在单个能量函数中共存，将我们的方法置于基于能量的模型（EBM）的框架内。通过 Guerra 插值方案导出的复制对称自由能产生了控制整个控制参数空间的阶次参数的自洽方程。有效局部场分解为信号、层内梦噪声和层间噪声。 Dreaming 通过差分衰减经验相关矩阵的高特征值干扰模式来改进检索，在保留信号的同时抑制模式间串扰。梦想和层间耦合证明了协同作用，打开了仅通过任何一种机制都无法到达的检索区域，正如 $L=3$ 的蒙特卡罗模拟所证实的那样。

它们的相互作用在模式解缠上最为明显：给定混合状态作为输入，网络将构成模式拆分为每一层，从同时混合来自所有感觉通道的噪声证据的共同线索中恢复每种特定于模态的模式。相图是超空间 $(\alpha,\beta,\rho,t)$ 的平面投影 - 其中 $\alpha$ 是存储负载，$\beta$ 是快速噪声逆温度，$\rho$ 是数据集熵，$t$ 是睡眠时间。在 $(\rho,t)$ 平面中，这些图揭示了数据计算的权衡：离线整合替代了额外的训练数据，将先前为自关联网络建立的现象扩展到异关联架构。用异关联性和梦想丰富标准 Hopfield 模型，使 EBM 能够执行经典模式识别之外的复杂任务，从而为现代神经信息处理理论做出了贡献。

title: Parallel Scan Recurrent Neural Quantum States for Scalable Variational Monte Carlo
abstract: Neural-network quantum states have emerged as a powerful variational framework for quantum many-body systems, with recent progress often driven by massively parallel architectures such as transformers. Recurrent neural network quantum states, however, are frequently regarded as intrinsically sequential and therefore less scalable. Here we revisit this view by showing that modern recurrent architectures can support fast, accurate, and computationally accessible neural quantum state simulations. Using autoregressive recurrent wave functions together with recent advances in parallelizable recurrence, we develop variational ansätze, called parallel scan recurrent neural quantum states (PSR-NQS), which can be trained efficiently within variational Monte Carlo in one and two spatial dimensions. We demonstrate accurate benchmark results and show that, with iterative retraining, our approach reaches two-dimensional spin lattices as large as $52\times52$ while remaining in agreement with available quantum Monte Carlo data. Our results establish recurrent architectures as a practical and promising route toward scalable neural quantum state simulations with modest computational resources.
summary: 神经网络量子态已成为量子多体系统的强大变分框架，最近的进展通常是由变压器等大规模并行架构推动的。然而，循环神经网络量子态通常被认为本质上是连续的，因此可扩展性较差。在这里，我们通过证明现代循环架构可以支持快速、准确且可计算的神经量子态模拟来重新审视这一观点。利用自回归递归波函数以及可并行递归的最新进展，我们开发了变分分析，称为并行扫描递归神经量子态（PSR-NQS），它可以在一维和二维空间维度的变分蒙特卡罗中进行有效训练。我们展示了准确的基准测试结果，并表明，通过迭代再训练，我们的方法达到了高达 52\times52$ 的二维自旋晶格，同时与可用的量子蒙特卡罗数据保持一致。我们的结果将循环架构建立为一种实用且有前途的途径，以适度的计算资源实现可扩展的神经量子态模拟。

title: A solvable model of 3d quantum gravity
abstract: We consider a model of 3d quantum gravity defined by $n$ copies of a rational Virasoro TQFT with central charge $1/2$, summed over all 3d topologies. This theory is holographically dual to an ensemble of all 2d CFTs with central charge $c=n/2$ and chiral algebra that includes $Vir_{1/2}^n$. We perform the sum over topologies and evaluate the partition function of the bulk theory. We then confirm the holographic duality by matching it to the boundary ensemble for small $n$. We proceed to consider the limit of a large central charge, in which the bulk theory simplifies and condenses to an Abelian phase. In this regime, the model manifests many features expected in semiclassical 3d quantum gravity. In particular, inclusion of all 3d topologies in the bulk sum cures the negativity of the density of states evaluated by the torus partition function. The model also exhibits a Hawking-Page transition, an exponentially suppressed wormhole amplitude, and provides a toy example of the holographic code. We discuss these aspects in detail and conclude with lessons for semiclassical quantum gravity.
summary: 我们考虑一个 3d 量子引力模型，它由 $n$ 个有理 Virasoro TQFT 副本定义，中心电荷为 $1/2$，对所有 3d 拓扑进行求和。该理论与具有中心电荷 $c=n/2$ 和包括 $Vir_{1/2}^n$ 的手征代数的所有 2d CFT 的系综是全息对偶的。我们对拓扑进行求和并评估体理论的配分函数。然后，我们通过将其与小 $n$ 的边界系综相匹配来确认全息对偶性。我们继续考虑大中心电荷的极限，其中体理论简化并浓缩为阿贝尔相。在这种情况下，该模型表现出半经典 3d 量子引力中预期的许多特征。特别是，将所有 3d 拓扑包含在体和中可以消除由环面配分函数评估的态密度的负性。该模型还展示了霍金-佩奇转变、指数抑制的虫洞振幅，并提供了全息代码的玩具示例。我们详细讨论这些方面，并以半经典量子引力的教训作为结论。

title: String probes, simple currents, and the no global symmetries conjecture
abstract: Center one-form symmetries in consistent quantum gravity theories are expected to be either broken or gauged, thereby determining the global form of the gauge group. We shed light on this expectation from the perspective of distinguished extended objects, which we denote by faithful string probes, for which the gauge symmetry is realized as a holomorphic current algebra. We argue that the worldsheet counterpart of gauged center one-form symmetries is the existence of chiral simple currents extending the current algebra. Accordingly, we show that the consistency condition for such extensions reproduce and generalize known field theoretic and geometric obstructions to the gauging of center one-form symmetries in six and eight dimensions. We verify this picture in a number of examples arising from heterotic string compactifications, and apply it to infer the gauge group topology of a recently identified class of six-dimensional models with no known F-theoretic realization. In 6d supergavity, our results also clarify an observation of Kim and Vafa on the existence of BPS particles required for consistency upon circle reduction: these particles arise from worldsheet simple currents whose existence is dictated by the presence of a gauged center one-form symmetry. Intriguingly, in several models across different dimensions we find composite higher-spin chiral currents beyond the current algebra, hinting at a stringy generalization of center one-form symmetries in the bulk.
summary:
一致量子引力理论中的中心一式对称性预计会被破缺或规范化，从而确定规范群的全局形式。我们从区分扩展对象的角度阐明了这一期望，我们用忠实的弦探针来表示，其规范对称性被实现为全纯电流代数。我们认为，测量中心一式对称性的世界表对应物是扩展当前代数的手性简单流的存在。因此，我们表明，这种扩展的一致性条件再现并概括了已知的场论和几何障碍，以测量六维和八维的中心一型对称性。我们在由异质弦紧化产生的许多例子中验证了这张图，并将其应用于推断最近确定的一类没有已知 F 理论实现的六维模型的规范群拓扑。

在 6 维超重力中，我们的结果还澄清了 Kim 和 Vafa 对圆缩减时一致性所需的 BPS 粒子存在的观察：这些粒子来自世界表简单流，其存在由测量中心单形对称性的存在决定。有趣的是，在不同维度的几个模型中，我们发现了超出当前代数的复合高自旋手性电流，这暗示了整体中心单一形式对称性的弦状概括。

title: Butterflies in $\textrm{T}\overline{\textrm{T}}$ deformed anomalous CFT$_2$
abstract: We study quantum chaos in $\textrm{T}\overline{\textrm{T}}$-deformed two-dimensional conformal field theories with gravitational anomaly and their holographic dual description in topologically massive gravity. Using pole-skipping and shock-wave analysis, we extract the Lyapunov exponent and butterfly velocity and analyze the interplay between irrelevant deformation and parity-violating dynamics. We find that the chaos bound remains saturated, while the butterfly velocity exhibits nontrivial dependence on the deformation parameter and anomaly. We also identify a Hagedorn regime in which the chaotic response becomes complex valued, signaling a breakdown of the physical branch of the deformed theory.
summary: 我们研究具有引力异常的$\textrm{T}\overline{\textrm{T}}$变形二维共形场论中的量子混沌及其在拓扑质量引力中的全息对偶描述。利用跳极和冲击波分析，我们提取了 Lyapunov 指数和蝶形速度，并分析了不相关变形和宇称破坏动力学之间的相互作用。我们发现混沌边界保持饱和，而蝴蝶速度表现出对变形参数和异常的非平凡依赖性。我们还确定了一个哈格多恩体系，其中混沌响应变得复数值，标志着变形理论的物理分支的崩溃。

title: Criticality Quenching and Microstructure of Quintessence-AdS Black Holes
abstract: In this work, we investigate the thermodynamic geometry of Reissner-Nordstrom Anti-de Sitter (RN-AdS) black holes with quintessence in the grand canonical ensemble. The analysis employs the Ruppeiner curvature scalar to elucidate the microscopic interactions and critical phenomena in the extended phase space. Divergence of the scalar curvature signal phase transitions, while its sign characterizes the nature of the underlying interactions; negative for attractive and positive for repulsive type interactions. The analysis reveals that attractive interactions dominate at low electric potentials, whereas repulsive interactions prevail at higher potentials unlike the usual charged black holes. Finally, the interaction strength is fairly constant during the phase transition, providing a greater understanding of the quintessence influenced microscopic attributes of RN-AdS black holes.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们研究了 Reissner-Nordstrom 反德西特 (RN-AdS) 黑洞的热力学几何结构，这是大正则系综中的精髓。该分析采用鲁派纳曲率标量来阐明扩展相空间中的微观相互作用和临界现象。标量曲率信号相变的发散，而其符号表征了潜在相互作用的性质；对于吸引型相互作用为负，对于排斥型相互作用为正。分析表明，与通常的带电黑洞不同，吸引力相互作用在低电势下占主导地位，而排斥相互作用在较高电势下占主导地位。最后，相互作用强度在相变过程中相当恒定，这有助于更好地理解 RN-AdS 黑洞的微观属性的本质影响。

title: Collision Dynamics of False-Vacuum Oscillons
abstract: We study the collision dynamics of localized oscillons in two classes of $(1+1)$-dimensional scalar field theories with metastable false vacua, a normal class with a positive quartic self-interaction term and an inverted class with a negative quartic term. We construct small-amplitude oscillon solutions around the false vacuum using the Fodor {\emph{et al.}} expansion, and show that the force between oscillons decays exponentially at large separation, with a strength modulated by their relative phase. Numerical simulations of two-oscillon collisions exhibit reflection, crossing, and formation of excited oscillons. Resonance windows occur, similar to those found in kink-antikink collisions. In the normal theory, if the oscillons have sufficient energy, the field can pass over a sphaleron barrier and evolve into a kink-antikink pair, initiating a phase transition to the true vacuum. We also simulate the collision of oscillons evolved from a slightly perturbed sphaleron.
summary: 我们研究了两类具有亚稳态假真空的 $(1+1)$ 维标量场论中局域振荡的碰撞动力学，即具有正四次自相互作用项的正态类和具有负四次项的倒置类。我们使用 Fodor {\emph{et al.}} 展开式在假真空周围构造了小振幅振荡解，并表明振荡之间的力在大间距下呈指数衰减，其强度由它们的相对相位调制。两个振荡碰撞的数值模拟展示了激发振荡的反射、交叉和形成。出现共振窗口，类似于扭结-反扭结碰撞中发现的共振窗口。在正常理论中，如果振荡有足够的能量，场可以越过闪面势垒并演变成扭结-反扭结对，从而启动向真真空的相变。我们还模拟了由轻微扰动的鳞片演化而来的振荡的碰撞。

title: Path-Integral Description of Stochastic Mechanics
abstract: I review the Feynman-Wiener path-integral formalism for diffusion with drift and jumps.
summary: 我回顾了带有漂移和跳跃的扩散的费曼-维纳路径积分形式。

title: Neural Networks, Dispersion Relations and the Thermal Bootstrap
abstract: We review a framework for the conformal bootstrap that does not rely on positivity and treats the infinite tower of high-dimension OPE contributions to conformal correlators through dispersion relations and neural networks. We apply it to scalar thermal two-point functions on $S^1\times \mathbb R^{d-1}$. We discuss the stability properties of the relevant non-convex optimisation scheme and potential relations to recent discussions of smoothness properties in CFT correlators. We illustrate the numerical application of the method to Generalized Free Fields and 4d holographic CFTs. This is a proceedings contribution to the ``Athens Workshop in Theoretical Physics: 10th Anniversary", held at the National and Kapodistrian University of Athens on December 17-19 2025.
summary: 我们回顾了一个共形自举框架，该框架不依赖于正性，并通过色散关系和神经网络处理高维 OPE 对共形相关器的无限塔贡献。我们将其应用于 $S^1\times \mathbb R^{d-1}$ 上的标量热两点函数。我们讨论了相关非凸优化方案的稳定性特性以及与 CFT 相关器中平滑特性最近讨论的潜在关系。我们说明了该方法在广义自由场和 4d 全息 CFT 中的数值应用。这是 2025 年 12 月 17 日至 19 日在雅典国立卡波季斯特里亚大学举办的“理论物理雅典研讨会：十周年”的会议论文集。

title: Quantum spacetime and quantum fluctuations in the IKKT model at weak coupling
abstract: This paper aims to clarify conceptual aspects of emergent structure in IKKT-type matrix models. Even without any adjustable parameters in the action, non-trivial matrix vacua do acquire a meaningful coupling constant, as well as two distinct uncertainty scales: a) the scale of noncommutativity of the matrix background, and b) the scale of quantum fluctuations of the matrices under the path integral. These scales are estimated for two prototypes of matrix backgrounds, known as Moyal-Weyl quantum plane and covariant quantum spacetime. Their relative importance separates two regimes: 1) the semi-classical regime interpreted in terms of semi-classical noncommutative geometry, and 2) the deep quantum regime usually interpreted in terms of holography. The quantum fluctuations are shown to be negligible in the weak coupling regime. This justifies previous work on the emergent 3+1-dimensional semi-classical geometry and (quantum) gravity in suitable vacua.
summary: 本文旨在阐明 IKKT 型矩阵模型中涌现结构的概念。即使在作用中没有任何可调节参数，非平凡矩阵真空也确实获得了有意义的耦合常数，以及两个不同的不确定性尺度：a）矩阵背景的非交换性尺度，b）路径积分下矩阵的量子涨落尺度。这些尺度是针对两个矩阵背景原型（称为莫亚尔-韦尔量子平面和协变量子时空）进行估计的。它们的相对重要性区分了两个体系：1）用半经典非交换几何解释的半经典体系，2）通常用全息术解释的深量子体系。在弱耦合状态下，量子涨落可以忽略不计。这证明了之前在适当真空中关于新兴 3+1 维半经典几何和（量子）引力的工作是合理的。

title: What does it mean to have a quantum gravitational theory of de Sitter Space?
abstract: We argue that if de Sitter space is indeed represented by a finite dimensional quantum system, then semi-classical considerations, combined with the fundamental principles of quantum measurement theory, imply that any theoretical model of it is ambiguous. If our own universe asymptotes to such a de Sitter state, and if a model of it as a finite system can be embedded in a sequence of models that converges to a non-perturbative completion of a unique superstring model in asymptotically flat space, then one might be able to find a very precise mathematical model of our universe. However, even the most comprehensive experiments possible to local detectors in the universe cannot measure more than a tiny fraction of the total number of q-bits in the system.
summary: 我们认为，如果德西特空间确实由有限维量子系统表示，那么半经典考虑因素与量子测量理论的基本原理相结合，意味着它的任何理论模型都是模糊的。如果我们自己的宇宙渐近到这样的德西特状态，并且如果它作为有限系统的模型可以嵌入到一系列模型中，这些模型收敛到渐近平坦空间中唯一超弦模型的非微扰完成，那么人们也许能够找到我们宇宙的非常精确的数学模型。然而，即使对宇宙中的局部探测器进行最全面的实验，也只能测量系统中 q 位总数的一小部分。

title: Semiclassical algebraic reconstruction for type III algebras
abstract: In this work, we address the unresolved type III cases of the algebraic reconstruction theorem by integrating crossed product algebras and semiclassical approximations. We first derive that the relative entropy in crossed product algebras factorizes into contributions from the original algebra and observer wavefunctions. By constructing ``holographic'' crossed product algebras for ``bulk'' and ``boundary'' type III factors, we extend the algebraic reconstruction theorem to include the algebraic Ryu-Takayanagi (RT) formula semiclassically, which provides a complete algebraic description of the reconstruction theorem, as an intrinsic framework for the algebraic version of bulk-boundary correspondences in holographic duality.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们通过集成交叉积代数和半经典近似来解决代数重构定理的未解决的 III 类情况。我们首先推导出叉积代数中的相对熵分解为原始代数和观察者波函数的贡献。通过为“体”和“边界”III型因子构造“全息”交叉乘积代数，我们将代数重建定理扩展到半经典的代数Ryu-Takayanagi（RT）公式，它提供了重建定理的完整代数描述，作为全息对偶中体边界对应的代数版本的内在框架。

title: Before the Bang: Wormholes at the Dawn of the Universe
abstract: This essay discusses recent progress on Euclidean wormholes as candidate contributions to the Universe's initial quantum state. The comparison with the Hartle-Hawking no-boundary proposal highlights both a conceptual affinity and genuine advance: wormholes retain the relevance of Euclidean-saddles as encoders of properties of cosmological wavefunctions, while they broaden the class of regular saddles that are physically relevant for inflating universes and are capable of resolving issues that plague the no-boundary proposal. The principal achievement of the wormhole program is to enlarge the semiclassical initial-condition land-scape in a way that is physically rich, conforms with Holographic expectations and as such becomes increasingly relevant for early-universe model building, within UV complete theories of quantum gravity.
summary: 本文讨论了欧几里得虫洞作为对宇宙初始量子态的候选贡献的最新进展。与哈特尔-霍金无边界提议的比较凸显了概念上的亲和力和真正的进步：虫洞保留了欧几里得鞍座作为宇宙波函数属性编码器的相关性，同时它们拓宽了与膨胀宇宙物理相关的常规鞍座的类别，并且能够解决困扰无边界提议的问题。虫洞计划的主要成就是以物理上丰富的方式扩大半经典初始条件景观，符合全息期望，因此在紫外完整的量子引力理论中与早期宇宙模型的构建越来越相关。

title: Universal Confining Strings: From Compact QED to the Hadron Spectrum
abstract: We investigate the description of quark confinement in terms of confining strings or flux tubes. We show that compact QED with a topological $\theta$-term, in the dyon condensation phase, is described by a massive two-form field $B_{\mu \nu}$ that gives rise to a string theory with an IR Brazovskii-Lifshitz fixed point at strong coupling. This corresponds to a quantum consistent "free string" in (3+1) dimensions, representing the dual of asymptotic freedom in the UV. Contrary to critical strings, which correspond to trivial Gaussian fixed points, this string is stabilized by a finite thickness, determined by the mass of the $B_{\mu \nu}$ field, instead of living in a higher-dimensional space. It correspondingly contains a massive world-sheet resonance, in addition to the Nambu-Goto phonons, that improves fitting with data. We compute the confining potential and show that it reproduces a generalized Arvis potential $V(L) = aL \sqrt{1 - c/L^2}$ with running parameters $a(L), c(L)$. We compute the mass difference ratios for the heaviest quarkonium and find 2.5 percent agreement with experiment already at the infrared fixed point. We also compute the intercept of Regge trajectories and find that the thickness of Brazovskii-Lifshitz strings tends to increase it from the Nambu-Goto value $\alpha_0 = 1/12$. Overall, our findings strongly support Polyakov's longstanding conjecture on universality of confining gauge theories in the IR.
summary:
我们研究了用限制弦或通量管来描述夸克限制。我们证明，在动力凝结阶段，具有拓扑 $\theta$ 项的紧致 QED 是由一个巨大的二元场 $B_{\mu \nu}$ 描述的，该场产生了强耦合下具有 IR Brazovskii-Lifshitz 不动点的弦理论。这对应于（3+1）维中的量子一致“自由弦”，代表紫外中渐近自由的对偶。与对应于平凡高斯不动点的临界弦相反，该弦通过有限的厚度来稳定，该厚度由 $B_{\mu \nu}$ 场的质量决定，而不是生活在更高维的空间中。除了南部五岛声子之外，它还相应地包含大量的世界面共振，从而改善了与数据的拟合。我们计算限制势并表明它再现了广义 Arvis 势 $V(L) = aL \sqrt{1 - c/L^2}$ ，运行参数为 $a(L), c(L)$。我们计算了最重夸克素的质量差比，发现与红外固定点的实验结果有 2.5% 的一致性。

我们还计算了 Regge 轨迹的截距，发现 Brazovskii-Lifshitz 弦的厚度倾向于从 Nambu-Goto 值 $\alpha_0 = 1/12$ 开始增加。总的来说，我们的发现有力地支持了波利亚科夫长期以来关于红外限域规范理论普遍性的猜想。

title: An algebra of proper observables at null infinity: Dirac brackets, Memory and Goldstone probes
abstract: We develop a rigorous evaluation of Dirac brackets for classical observables on the phase space of radiative gravitational modes at null infinity that naturally incorporates memory effects. Considering the Ashtekar-Streubel phase space, with boundary conditions in time given by vanishing {\it news} and purely electric {\it shear}, and taking into account the infinite dimensionality of the phase space, we identify the algebra of proper observables (understood as functions on phase space that can be associated with smooth symplectic flows). We show that the action of supertranslation charges generate the correct transformations on the shear. We also show that the conventional definition of the ``Goldstone mode'' adopted in the literature cannot be associated with a proper observable, but nevertheless there exists an infinite family of proper observables, which we call {\it Goldstone probes}, that are capable of measuring the Goldstone mode. We notice that there are no Goldstone probes constructed only out of the shear {\it or} the news, providing a possible explanation for why attempts to construct a (separable) Hilbert space with different memory states have failed so far. Finally, we derive formulas for distributional Dirac brackets between local shear and news, and show that they contain non-local corrections.
summary:
我们对零无穷远辐射引力模式相空间上的经典可观测量的狄拉克括号进行了严格的评估，自然地结合了记忆效应。考虑阿什特卡-斯特鲁贝尔相空间，通过消失{\it news}和纯电{\it剪切}给出的时间边界条件，并考虑到相空间的无限维，我们确定了适当可观测量的代数（理解为相空间上的函数，可以与平滑辛流相关）。我们表明，超平移电荷的作用会在剪切力上产生正确的变换。我们还表明，文献中采用的“戈德斯通模式”的传统定义不能与适当的可观测量相关联，但是仍然存在无限的适当可观测量族，我们将其称为{\it Goldstone探针}，它们能够测量戈德斯通模式。我们注意到，没有仅根据新闻的剪裁构建戈德斯通探针，这为为什么构建具有不同存储状态的（可分离）希尔伯特空间的尝试迄今为止失败提供了可能的解释。

最后，我们推导了局部剪切和新闻之间的分布狄拉克括号的公式，并表明它们包含非局部校正。

title: "Metric-affine-like" generalization of YM (mal-YM): detailed classical consideration
abstract: We consider the ``metric-affine-like'' generalization of the Yang-Mills theory (mal-YM) which we first proposed earlier. In this model, the connection is no longer assumed to be compatible with the Hermitian form in the fibers. As a consequence, along with the usual YM potential $\boldsymbol{A}_a$ and the field strength tensor $\boldsymbol{F}_{ab}$, it contains non-trivially interacting fields $\boldsymbol{B}_a$, $\boldsymbol{h}$, and $\boldsymbol{G}_{ab}$, $\boldsymbol{N}_a$, forming a non-Abelian generalization of Stückelberg theory. Due to the spontaneous symmetry breaking $GL(n,\mathbb{C}) \to U(n)$, these new fields can be made massive and the limit $M\to\infty$ restores the standard YM theory. We perform a detailed analysis of this theory on the classical level. We discuss in detail geometric motivation for the model, field transformations, gauge symmetry and its spontaneous breaking, action, equations of motion, Noether identities, gauge fixing, and other issues.
summary: 我们考虑我们之前首次提出的杨米尔斯理论（mal-YM）的“类度量仿射”推广。在此模型中，不再假定连接与光纤中的埃尔米特形式兼容。因此，与通常的 YM 势 $\boldsymbol{A}_a$ 和场强张量 $\boldsymbol{F}_{ab}$ 一起，它包含非平凡的相互作用场 $\boldsymbol{B}_a$、$\boldsymbol{h}$ 和 $\boldsymbol{G}_{ab}$、$\boldsymbol{N}_a$，形成非阿贝尔推广施图克伯格理论。由于自发对称性破缺 $GL(n,\mathbb{C}) \to U(n)$，这些新场可以变得巨大，并且极限 $M\to\infty$ 恢复了标准 YM 理论。我们在经典层面对该理论进行了详细的分析。我们详细讨论模型的几何动机、场变换、规范对称性及其自发破缺、作用、运动方程、诺特恒等式、规范固定和其他问题。

title: Scaling Symmetry in Symplectic Thermodynamics
abstract: This paper investigates scaling symmetry in thermodynamics by unifying constrained Hamiltonian dynamics with symplectic and contact geometries. Through the mathematical processes of contactization and symplectization, we demonstrate that fixing an extended global scale variable effectively recovers the standard thermodynamic description in terms of scale-invariant quantities. The geometric formalism is illustrated by establishing the diffeomorphism between the Lagrangian submanifolds of ideal and van der Waals gases. Finally, applying this framework to a Schwarzschild black hole reveals that breaking the scale symmetry between internal energy and entropy is a fundamental physical requirement to accommodate non-isothermal dynamics.
summary: 本文通过将约束哈密顿动力学与辛几何和接触几何相结合来研究热力学中的标度对称性。通过接触化和辛化的数学过程，我们证明固定扩展的全局尺度变量可以有效地恢复尺度不变量的标准热力学描述。通过建立理想气体和范德华气体的拉格朗日子流形之间的微分同胚来说明几何形式主义。最后，将该框架应用于史瓦西黑洞表明，打破内能和熵之间的尺度对称性是适应非等温动力学的基本物理要求。

title: Unitary invariance of Connes spectral distances of quantum states
abstract: In this paper, we study the properties of Connes spectral distances between quantum states under unitary transformations. We mainly focus on spectral triples with matrix algebras acting on finite dimensional Hilbert spaces via some linear representations. We derive some elementary properties of the Connes spectral distances and optimal elements. We prove that there are some finite spectral triples in which the Lipschitz seminorms are equal to the operator norms. We also explicitly construct some spectral triples in which the Connes spectral distances between quantum states are exactly the quantum trace distances. These results and concrete examples are significant for studies of geometric structures of finite spectral triples and mathematical relations of qubits and other quantum states in the framework of noncommutative geometry.
summary: 在本文中，我们研究了酉变换下量子态之间的康涅斯谱距离的性质。我们主要关注通过一些线性表示作用于有限维希尔伯特空间的矩阵代数的谱三元组。我们推导出康斯谱距离和最佳元素的一些基本属性。我们证明存在一些有限谱三元组，其中 Lipschitz 半范数等于算子范数。我们还明确地构造了一些光谱三元组，其中量子态之间的康尼斯光谱距离恰好是量子迹线距离。这些结果和具体例子对于研究有限谱三元组的几何结构以及非交换几何框架中量子位和其他量子态的数学关系具有重要意义。

title: A Guide to Applications of $k$-Contact Geometry in Dissipative Field Equations
abstract: We study the practical scope of the $k$-contact Hamilton--De Donder--Weyl formalism as a geometric framework for dissipative field equations. In particular, our work focuses on canonical $k$-contact manifolds on $\bigoplus^k {\rm T}^*Q\times\mathbb{R}^k$ and $k$-contactifications of exact $k$-symplectic phase spaces. A special two-contactification of exact two-symplectic structures on cotangent bundles is defined and analysed. We also develop several tools for applications, including splitting results for the Hamilton--De Donder--Weyl equations on $k$-contactifications, regularity conditions for such spaces, criteria for the ultrahyperbolicity, hyperbolicity, or ellipticity of PDEs associated with Hamiltonian $k$-contact systems, dissipation laws associated with infinitesimal dynamical symmetries, relevance and applications of quadratic dissipative terms in the Hamiltonian, etc. Our methods yield explicit Hamiltonian descriptions for several nonlinear nonconservative PDEs with polynomial dissipative terms, including damped Klein--Gordon, Allen--Cahn, generalized Burgers, porous medium equations with linear absorption, complex Ginzburg--Landau, damped nonlinear Schrödinger, Fisher--KPP, damped $\phi^4$, damped sine--Gordon, and FitzHugh--Nagumo equations, and many others. Our work also stresses the many further practical applications of this framework.
summary:
我们研究了 $k$ 接触 Hamilton-De Donder-Weyl 形式主义作为耗散场方程的几何框架的实际范围。特别是，我们的工作重点是 $\bigoplus^k {\rm T}^*Q\times\mathbb{R}^k$ 上的规范 $k$-接触流形和精确 $k$-辛相空间的 $k$-接触。定义并分析了余切丛上精确二辛结构的特殊二接触化。我们还开发了多种应用工具，包括$k$接触上的Hamilton--De Donder-Weyl方程的分裂结果、此类空间的正则条件、与哈密顿$k$接触系统相关的偏微分方程的超双曲性、双曲性或椭圆性标准、与无穷小动力学对称性相关的耗散定律、哈密顿量中二次耗散项的相关性和应用等。

我们的方法使用多项式耗散项对几种非线性非保守偏微分方程产生显式哈密顿描述，包括阻尼 Klein--Gordon、Allen--Cahn、广义 Burgers、具有线性吸收的多孔介质方程、复数 Ginzburg--Landau、阻尼非线性 Schrödinger、Fisher--KPP、阻尼 $\phi^4$、阻尼正弦 --Gordon 和 FitzHugh--Nagumo方程，以及许多其他的。我们的工作还强调了该框架的许多进一步的实际应用。

title: On the asymptotic behavior at the kinetic time of a weakly interacting Fermi gas
